description: linode_image_sharegroup_image_list envelope: count and the full proto Image elements under the images key. Go previously emitted a FormatListResponse of raw structs and Python over-wrapped {message,count,images,page,...}; the proto envelope is the fix. This sub-resource list paginates and never echoes a filter.

images.label: shared-custom-image
images.description: Image shared into a share group
